The United States has fought six major wars in Asia since the end of World War II (not counting proxy wars and special operations):

Korea: stalemate
Vietnam: lost
Gulf: won
Iraq: won, but failed long-term goals
Afghanistan: lost
Iran: stalemate

Not a great track record.
